response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software development with experience in multiple languages and frameworks, but his resume lacks direct experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise tooling, IDE internals, or JVM-specific development. His expertise leans toward web, embedded systems, and general tooling rather than enterprise Java/Kotlin ecosystems or IDE subsystems, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks
Proven track record in building and maintaining complex systems and developer tools
Demonstrated ability to contribute to open-source projects and technical communities
concerns: No visible experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise frameworks (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) or JVM tooling
Limited or no experience with IDE internals or language tooling
Most recent roles focus on web/mobile development rather than enterprise IDE or JVM-specific work

key_factors.factor: Full-stack or general software development experience
